name: Korapay
description: African payment infrastructure API for collections, payouts, and cross-border payments via cards, bank transfers, mobile money.

seo.title: Korapay — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Korapay: African payment infrastructure API for collections, payouts, and cross-border payments via cards, bank transfers, mobile money.

when_to_use: Card, bank transfer, and mobile money collection across Africa
Cross-border payouts to African bank accounts and mobile wallets
Virtual account collection for Nigerian and African fintech platforms
Embedded African payment infrastructure API for global e-commerce platforms

pros: Mobile money, bank, and card rails combined
cons: Some countries have limited payout coverage
Smaller than Flutterwave in merchant reach
review.verdict: Strong Africa-focused payments API for cross-border flows — a credible Flutterwave alternative for many teams.
review.best_for: Startups needing pan-African collections and payouts via one API
review.not_for: Teams needing only single-country acquiring or global coverage
